title: JSONPath Data Extraction
description:
## Extracting Data with JSONPath

Kubectl allows you to extract specific fields from resource manifests using JSONPath, which is incredibly useful for scripting and automation.

**Your task:**

A deployment named `hidden-app` is running in the `default` namespace. Use `kubectl` with a JSONPath expression to output **only the container image name** used by that deployment.

> Expected output: `nginx:1.25.3`

hints.title: JSONPath syntax
hints.body: The image is located at `.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image`. Use -o jsonpath to extract it.

commands.description: kubectl jsonpath returns the correct image
